headings.text: CNC Milling In Brass – Precision Brass Milling Components & Parts
OEM Custom Brass Milling Services – China CNC Brass Milling Parts Manufacturer

meta_description: Junying is committed to manufacturing precision CNC brass milling parts and machined components to meet customers’ specifications.

sections.heading: CNC Milling In Brass – Precision Brass Milling Components & Parts
sections.text: CNC Milling In Brass – Precision Brass Milling Components & Parts Brass is an alloy consisting of copper and zinc, it’s an ideal material for manufacturing CNC machined parts including CNC milling parts. Brass CNC milling is applying a block or sheet placed on a table below a spindle which holds a cutting tool. This table rotates as well as pivots, making two axes of movement. Cutting tools mounted on a rotating spindle remove material to create shapes. After completing various surface treatment including plating, polish, heat treatment, nickel, zinc,tin, silver, chrome plating, then you can get the final brass milled product.
